raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Survivor Support and Demand Reduction Act aims to establish a fund for community-based organizations supporting victims of sex trafficking.",
    "The bill makes it a crime to loiter with the intent to purchase sex.",
    "The crime of purchasing a minor for sex applies in any case where the victim is under the age of 18.",
    "California decriminalized loitering for prostitution in 2022, making it more difficult for law enforcement to intervene in sex trafficking cases.",
    "Sex trafficking disproportionately impacts girls and women of color from impoverished neighborhoods, LGBTQ youth, and children from the foster care system.",
    "Victims of sex trafficking often experience increased levels of violence.",
    "Demand for commercial sex leads to significant negative impacts on neighborhoods and small businesses.",
    "The Survivor Support Fund will use fines collected from offenders to support community-based organizations that provide services to sex trafficking victims.",
    "The bill requires law enforcement to offer diversion programs for first and second-time offenders charged with prostitution."
  ]
}
```
